summary: This page concludes examples of representing piecewise signals using the unit step function through Exercises E1.7 and E1.8, with accompanying figures. It then begins a new topic introducing the unit impulse function \(\delta(t)\), giving Dirac's defining properties and explaining its interpretation as the limiting case of a narrow rectangular pulse of unit area.

figures.caption: Fig. 1.17 The Signal for Exercise E1.7.
Fig. 1.18 The signal for Exercise E1.8.
